Permacrisis is the 2022 word of the year<ref>[https://www.washingtonpost.com/lifestyle/2022/11/01/permacrisis-2022-word-year-collins-dictionary/#:~:text=%E2%80%9CPermacrisis%2C%E2%80%9D%20which%20is%20defined,in%20many%20quarters%2C%20political%20chaos. https://www.washingtonpost.com/lifestyle/2022/11/01/permacrisis-2022-word-year-collins-dictionary/#:~:text=%E2%80%9CPermacrisis%2C%E2%80%9D%20which%20is%20defined,in%20many%20quarters%2C%20political%20chaos.]</ref>

== References ==
[[Category:Meta-Crisis]]
[[sn:Permacrisis]][[Category:Pages that existed before the Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Permacrisis]][[sn:Permacrisis]]
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
